[[File:Statius's warhammer detail.png|160px|left]]
'''Statius's warhammer''' is a crush weapon requiring level 78 [[Strength]] and 20 [[Attack]] to wield. It is part of [[Statius's equipment]], a set of [[Ancient Warriors' equipment]].

On permanent [[Deadman Mode]] worlds, it is dropped by any monster found in the [[Wilderness]] as part of a [[Deadman Mode#Global loot table|global loot table]], the chance being relative to the combat level of the monster. It can also be obtained from looting [[Deadman's chest (scenery)|Deadman's chests]] and as a drop from [[breach monster]]s in [[Deadman: Annihilation]].

The warhammer works in place of a regular [[hammer]] for building [[Small storage unit|storage chests]] in the [[Chambers of Xeric]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Smash (Statius's warhammer).gif|thumb|250px|A player performing Statius's warhammer's special attack.]]
Statius's warhammer has a [[special attack]], ''Smash'', that consumes 35% of the player's [[special attack energy]] and deals between 25% and 125% of the user's max hit, while lowering the target's '''current''' [[Defence]] level by 30% on a hit other than zero (the hit has to deal damage - even if it is a [[successful hit]] but rolls a zero, it does not work).

Defence level reductions '''do stack''' over multiple successful hits; each reduction is calculated from the current temporary level (so follow-up drains reduce fewer levels). Two successful special attacks thus reduce an opponent's Defence by a total of 51%.

Like the [[dragon warhammer]], the first special attack from Statius's warhammer is guaranteed to hit against [[Tekton]] in the [[Chambers of Xeric]].

==Trivia==
* Unlike most other [[warhammer]]s, including the [[Bounty Hunter]] version of the [[Statius's warhammer (bh)|Statius's warhammer]], the Deadman Mode version of the hammer has an [[Attack]] and [[Strength]] requirement instead of just a [[Strength]] requirement.
